'''Sorella''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sorella system/Legends|Sorella system]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Sorella was also one of the [[Freeworlds Territory]]. Also, it was a member of the [[Three Ellas]], with a liberal government looser about crime and smuggling than most [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani]] worlds.
